title: Extract URLs from a String
scenario: Write a prompt that takes a string containing URLs in different formats (e.g., 'https://www.example.com', 'http://example.com', 'www.example.com') and extracts the URLs. The output should be a list of extracted URLs.
constraints: Must be under 20 lines of code

evaluationCriteria.description: The code should be syntactically correct and valid Python code.
The code should adhere to the constraints provided (Python solution and under 20 lines of code).
The code should correctly extract the URLs from the input string.
